name: Great Wall of China Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Sauerkraut (about 2 lbs) - rinsed and well drained
4 ounces Fresh snow peas, stemmed and cut in half diagonally
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 1-inch cubes and place in a 3-quart casserole.
2. Add 1 tablespoon oil. Cover with lid or vented plastic wrap.
3. Microwave on high for 5 to 6 minutes, stirring midway through cooking, until no longer pink.
4. Stir in sauerkraut and 2 tablespoons soy sauce; set aside.
5. Slice green onion tops; set aside.
6. Thinly slice the white part of onions and place in a 1-quart casserole with carrots, garlic, ginger, and 2 tablespoons soy sauce. Cover with lid or vented plastic wrap; microwave on high for 4 to 5 minutes.
7. Stir the carrot mixture into the sauerkraut mixture.
8. Place the snow peas on top. Cover again and microwave on high for 4 minutes until steaming.
9. Stir and serve. Makes 6 servings.
